description: arXiv:2607.10531v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent advances in LLMs and existing work on programming by demonstration have made it possible for end users to create automations by explicitly demonstrating their behavior to LLMs. However, these approaches rely on the assumption that users know what to automate and what is capable of being automated.
